data.content: Planning complete for foolery-5800. Implement server-owned approval actions by adding a shared approval action/reply-target contract, recording pending approvals on the live `SessionEntry`, exposing `POST /api/terminal/[sessionId]/approvals/[approvalId]`, and delegating replies through `AgentSessionRuntime` to transport-specific responders. UI/store should only render actions advertised by `supportedActions`, call the server endpoint, and track responding/resolved/failed/unsupported states; `session-connection-manager` remains receive-only for SSE banners. Coordinate with c4db (OpenCode metadata), 94da (Claude prompt-mode support), and 5edd (manual harness validation). No child knots were created because those sibling knots already split the approvals todo list.
